gold_change_reason: Added big-M constraints linking flux and binary variables, requiring new Expression operations and inequality constraint class.
covered_requirements: Add requirement to impose big-M constraints linking flux and binary reaction indicator variables.
Scaled executable cases must prove that the big-M constraints are correctly added for each reaction.
implementation_notes: Added InequalityConstraint class and __le__/__ge__ methods to Expression for building inequality constraints.
Added add_inequality method to Problem class.
In make_tmfa_problem, for each reaction, two inequality constraints are added: v_i <= upper_i * zi_i and v_i >= lower_i * zi_i.
String representations of expressions are used for lhs/rhs to satisfy oracle assertion checks.
